title: Each Array
description: Iterate over an array of numbers and print each one using the .each iterator.
problemStatement:
The power of Each! Given an array `[10, 20, 30]`, use the `.each` method to print every number in the array inside a block.

**Requirement:** Use correctly named block parameters.
hints: Blocks are often written as `do ... end` or within `{ ... }` curly braces.
